# terrible_community_general_awall (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `activate` (Boolean) Activate the new firewall rules. Can be run with other steps or on its own. Idempotency is affected if `activate=true`, as the module always reports a changed state.
- `name` (String) One or more policy names.
- `state` (String) Whether the policies should be enabled or disabled.
